positioning.whatIsIt: An AI landing page generator built as a Claude Code skill. Paste a URL, answer 9 positioning questions, get a professional landing page with 5 tone variations in 2 minutes.
positioning.whatIsItNot: Not a drag-and-drop page builder. Not a template library. It's a copywriting-first generator that writes specific, swap-tested copy based on your actual positioning.
positioning.keyTakeaway: Landing pages with copy so specific that a competitor couldn't steal your headline. Built on 16 versions of battle-tested conversion copywriting rules.
positioning.wordOfMouth: It asked me 9 questions and generated a page with better copy than our marketing team wrote in two weeks.
positioning.competitors: Direct: v0, Framer AI, Mixo. Indirect: hiring a copywriter + developer. Manual: writing landing page copy from scratch in a doc.
positioning.howDifferent: Copywriting rules extracted from 200+ PRs of prompt engineering. 81/81 blind test accuracy. Swap test built in — every headline must be specific to your product or it rewrites automatically. 5 tone variations per section.
positioning.whyUsersWant: Ship a landing page fast without generic AI copy. Test positioning before committing to a full build. Get conversion-focused copy that passes the swap test. Compare 5 tones side by side.
positioning.objections: Will the copy actually be specific to my product? Can I customize the design? Is it just another AI page generator with generic output? What if I need more than a landing page?
